name: Oasis Security
oneliner: Non-human identity and agentic access management platform that discovers, secures, and governs AI agent identities and secrets across enterprise environments
finserv: Dedicated financial services product page; explicitly supports PCI DSS 4.0, SOC 2, GDPR; targets core banking and trading systems; Agentic Access Management product for AI agents
team: Founded by Danny Brickman and Amit Zimerman (Israeli Intelligence Unit 81 alumni); backed by Sequoia Capital, Accel, and Cyberstarts
thesis: As You deploys AI agents that act on behalf of advisors and clients, every agent action needs to be authenticated, permissioned, and auditable. Oasis Security's AAM platform solves exactly this — providing the identity trust layer that makes agentic deployments safe.
